features: Breathe Fresh, Live Better, Grease smells ruining the joy of cooking? Our cooker hood filter captures fat and odours instantly, keeping your kitchen feeling clean, light and beautifully fresh every day.

Fits Perfectly, Worries Gone. No more frustration with filters that never match. These extractor fan filters cut to size in seconds, restoring smooth airflow and giving your kitchen an effortless, clean feel.

Know Exactly When to Replace. Weak suction and hidden grime stressing you out? The saturation indicator ensures timely cooker hood filter replacement, keeping your kitchen protected and fresh always..
Deep Absorption, Less Scrubbing. Our carbon filter extractor fan technology absorbs fat quickly, cutting down cleaning time and preventing sticky residue from coating your walls and surfaces..
Odours Gone, Comfort Restored. Lingering smells spoiling your home? These charcoal filters for cooker hood neutralise odours fast, letting you relax in a kitchen that feels fresh, and inviting.

Safety and Purity You Can Trust. Breathe easier with a kitchen extractor fan filter built to German F1 DIN 53438 flame-retardant standards, delivering safe airflow, lasting freshness, and true peace of mind.
description: Product Description No More Odour-filled Air or Stubborn Fat Films — Just Effortless Freshness Stops Grease. Ends Smells Cooking should be joyful — not followed by lingering odours or stubborn grease. Experience a cleaner, more refined kitchen atmosphere with our universal cooker hood filter . Crafted from premium cooker hood filter paper , it gently absorbs grease and impurities, keeping your home fresh, elegant, and effortlessly inviting after every meal. Breathe easy and cook freely — your kitchen stays spotless, odour-free, and effortlessly inviting. Turn Odours into Fresh Air Universal. Suitable for all cooker hood up to 60cm Cut to fit. Easy installation, no tools required Anti Odour. Prevents all unwanted and bad odours Breathe in Freshness, not Fumes — Make every Meal Joyful Goodbye Odours. Hello Happiness Our compostable cooker hood filters are made from 100% natural viscose fibres, decomposing within 12 weeks for a greener kitchen. This eco-friendly cooker hood filter replacement delivers superior grease absorption for cleaner air and sustainable freshness. Our activated carbon filter consist of activated carbon and a polyester base material. They absorb unpleasant odours from cooker hoods in recirculating mode. Safety. These extractor fan filtes are fire retardeant and self extinguishing. They meet DIN 53438 ensuring safety in your kitchen. High grease absorption. These cooker hood grease filters are quipped with "blotting paper effect" which helps spread grease evenly ensuring consistent airflow and extended filter life. Extended Efficiency. Replace your universal cooker hood filter every 3 months for best performance. No More Sticky Walls or Lingering Cooking Smells Shoxfords Cooker Hood Filter Kit – Protects Your Hood, Cabinets & Air from Grease Damage Tired of greasy surfaces and stubborn cooking odours taking over your kitchen? The Shoxfords cooker hood filter Kit powerfully traps grease and grime with high absorption power before they spread. With advanced cooker hood filter paper and carbon filter extractor fan, enjoy a fresh, clean space that smells as good as it feels. German Strength Meets Fresh Living Fits Every Cooker Hood Perfectly One size fits all — The filter for extractor fan cooker hood can be easily cut to size for seamless installation and perfect coverage for all hood up to 60cm. Superior Grease Absorption Designed with advanced fibre technology, these compostable filters capture grease more effectively than standard polyester types—keeping your air pure and your conscience clear. Engineered for Everyday Safety Proudly made in Germany , our extractor hood filters embodies precision, quality, and trust. Expertly crafted for lasting performance, it catches the airborne grease resulting your home feeling effortlessly fresh. From Greasy Mess to Pure Bliss When Freshness Lifts Your Mood Transform the way you cook with our advanced kitchen hood filters and carbon filer extractor fan — designed to keep every meal surrounded by freshness, not fumes. Engineered for power and purity, our extractor hood filters capture even the finest grease and odour particles, so your kitchen feels lighter, cleaner, and truly alive with every dish you create. Being universal in size, they can be used as a replacement electrolux cooker hood filters and very good fit for replacement elica cooker hood filters and includes almost all cooker hood brands. Smart Saturation Indicator – Know Exactly When to Replace 1. What is a cooker hood filter and carbon filter and why do I need one? A cooker hood filter traps airborne grease particles released during cooking before they settle on walls or wardrobes. A carbon filter absorbs bad and unwanted odours. If applied both, they preserves air quality, protects surfaces, and prevents lingering odours in your kitchen giving you enhanced control both on grease and bad odours. 2. How do extractor fan filters differ, and which type is right for me? Extractor fan filters come in grease, carbon, paper or mesh types. Grease filters catch oil, carbon filters neutralize smell. Choose based on whether your hood is vented or recirculating, and your cooking style. 3. When should I schedule a cooker hood filter replacement? Replace your filter every 2–3 months—or sooner if your kitchen starts smelling or the filter indicator changes colour to red. Regular replacement maintains suction and keeps grease from clogging your system. 4. Can I use a kitchen extractor fan filter if my hood doesn’t vent outside? Yes—if your hood recirculates air, use charcoal or activated carbon extractor fan filters. They clean air by absorbing odours, letting you enjoy cooking without relying on external ducting. 5. What are cooker hood filter paper sheets and how do I pick the right one? Oven hood filter sheets are flat grease trapping membranes you can cut to size. Look for ones with high absorption capacity and flame-retardant material to ensure safety and effective grease capture.
